rules: This file is the ONLY status truth. Summaries, chat claims, and the HTML never override it.
Update after EVERY block: set the block's status, record evidence, recompute current_next_block, bump updated_at/updated_by.
A block is complete ONLY when its artifacts exist on disk AND are recorded in ledgers/FABLE_EVIDENCE_INDEX.md.
Never resolve an {{OWNER:*}} placeholder yourself — record it in blocked_on_owner and ledgers/FABLE_OWNER_DECISIONS.md, set the block status to blocked_on_owner, and stop that block.
After updating, run: python3 FABLES_HARNESS/verify_bundle.py — it must exit 0 before the session ends.
If a session dies mid-block, the block stays in_progress; the next session reads ledgers/FABLE_REENTRY_NOTE.md before touching anything.

status_vocabulary.in_progress: Started, not evidence-complete. Also the crash-recovery state.
status_vocabulary.complete_static: Verified already done during the survey; evidence recorded.
status_vocabulary.skipped_superseded: Owner-approved skip; reason recorded in FABLE_OWNER_DECISIONS.md.
status_vocabulary.blocked_on_owner: Waiting on an {{OWNER:*}} value or an OWNER GATE decision.
